results.title: AI Starter | An AI "Biz-in-a-Box": An instantly deployable, fully customizable AI SaaS Business | Product Hunt
results.content:
Everything is going well so far. Even though I've never worked with code before, I find the user interface easy to use, and the entry barrier has been lowered. I'm excited to try out some ideas when I have more free time. Before purchasing this product, I read through the comments and noticed that some people suggested there are more affordable options available in its current state. However, I decided to buy it for two reasons: - As far as I know, it's a one-time payment, and the tool will continue to receive more integrations and improve its functionality. - I'm willing to take a chance on Justin. I've done my due diligence by going through the comments section, various Telegram chats, his LinkedIn profile, and his newsletter, and I'm impressed with what he has accomplished in such a [...] and I'm impressed with what he has accomplished in such a short period of time. Overall, I will keep experimenting with the product and leave another review after I've had more experience using it. Great first impression & congratulations on a successful launch Justin. [...] Report

David Dennison

@juscxnn Thank you for the response and giving me a better glimpse into your thinking behind the product! Love the idea and I'll definitely be looking forward to 2.0! Keep up the good work!

Report

Adri Maximus

@juscxnn congrats for the launch! If I want to buy the product now, will we get future updates n functionality? Also do you have page by page captured of your features? Or live demo

results.title: PicSo Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content:
are other similar products like Midjourney. But as you all know, Midjourney relies entirely on Discord's bot server, which can limit people's creativity a lot. Both my friend and I desperately needed a mobile app that would solve our problems. When I learned that PicSo is a mobile app and did not rely on SD's open-source code, but was developed entirely by the team behind the product, I was very interested in it. I started getting involved with the enthusiastic user community and giving some suggestions. Fortunately, the team took some of my advice. I have seen the technical pursuits and efforts of this team, and I have also witnessed how they overthrow themselves and strive to establish their own influence in this field. I appreciate such professionalism. Currently, I've started using [...] Report

 1 view

•1 review

I was introduced to this via DeviantArt and was blown away by how easy it was to create art work! I can't draw to say my life yet a few works in the program of what you wan and bang you have an AI interpterion of your thoughts! Very handy for me as I make 3D renders and logos for businesses. I can use the AI image to help with my creativity if I get suck to help meet a clients wants. I recommend anyone needing help for creativity to try this out!

Report
